kind: what each predicate must know / reimplements

rows.mustKnow: cube + tray dimensions, containment margin (still 2D, rim-blind)
rows.reimplements: the verifier's footprint-containment geometry (2D — a cube 1 m above the tray still passes B3)

rows.mustKnow: + rim height (the z test B3 lacks)
rows.reimplements: the verifier's FULL 3D `csg.is_inside` (shrunk footprint AND rim height)

rows.mustKnow: + initial-state semantics (the cube must have STARTED outside)
rows.reimplements: the initial-state / outside->inside transition check (as a two-endpoint proxy)
the fail-closed evidence gate — here by IMPORTING the verifier's own `assess_evidence_quality` (a from-scratch baseline would have to re-derive it)
rows.form: bespoke predicate code + bolt-on of the verifier's gate

rows.mustKnow: the same assumptions, but DECLARED as data in the target graph (objects, objectStates, events, plannerView goals)
rows.reimplements: nothing per-task: one frozen engine (csg.matcher / verify_external_rollout) reads the graph; initial-state, transition, evidence gate, and leakage discipline are reusable components, not task-specific code
rows.form: declarative task graph + frozen reusable verifier
